zh.Portledge, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文波特萊其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Gambon於大約1435年出生在英國史洛普爾時，她的父親John Gambon56歲，母親Idonea d Abernon26歲。她於1457年與Richard Coffin在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1480年在英國享年47歲。

zh-hans.Portledge, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文波特萊其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Gambon于大约1435年出生在英国史洛普爾时，她的父亲John Gambon56岁，母亲Idonea d Abernon26岁。她于1457年与Richard Coffin在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1480年在英国享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gambon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gammon
meanings: nickname from a diminutive (‘little leg’) of gamb, the Norman form of jambe ‘leg’; mb would be assimilated to mm, hence Gammon. Compare French Gambet, Gambin, Gambon.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Gambon was born about 1435, in Shropshire, England, her father, John Gambon, was 56 and her mother, Idonea d Abernon, was 26. She married Richard Coffin in 1457, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1480, in England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Gambon est née environ 1435, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, John Gambon, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Idonea d Abernon, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Coffin en 1457, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1480, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Gambon um 1435 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Gambon 56 und ihre Mutter Idonea d Abernon 26. Sie hat 1457 in Devon, England Richard Coffin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1480 im Alter von 47 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Gambon è nata il circa 1435 nel Shropshire, England, sua padre, John Gambon, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Idonea d Abernon, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Richard Coffin nel 1457, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1480, nel England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Gambonが約1435年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Gambonは56歳，母Idonea d Abernonは26歳であった。1457年にイギリスデボンでRichard Coffinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1480年にイギリスで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Gambon(이)가 대략 1435년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Gambon(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Idonea d Abernon(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1457년 영국 데폰에서 Richard Coffin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1480년 영국에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Gambon nasceu aproximadamente 1435, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Gambon, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Idonea d Abernon, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Coffin em 1457, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1480, em Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Gambon родилась около 1435 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Gambon было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Idonea d Abernon, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Coffin в 1457 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1480 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Gambon nació aproximadamente 1435, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Gambon, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Idonea d Abernon, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Richard Coffin en 1457, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1480, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
